contents: Added Memoria ownership display and basic sorting / filtering functions.
Currently only Japanese text is supported. Other languages have not been translated yet.
Due to the addition of the Memoria page, the sharing system has been redesigned.
The old k= URL sharing format is no longer supported and has been fully replaced with Save Code mode.
Because importing a Save Code will overwrite local save data, a warning message will now appear before importing.
It is recommended to use Incognito Mode when viewing other people's save data.
Traits are now displayed in List Mode.
Traits can be clicked for quick filtering.
Displays all characters with the selected Trait, with owned characters highlighted.
Mobile devices will now recommend landscape orientation.
Skill Modal is now supported in landscape mode on mobile devices.
